title: Welcoming a New Classmate 欢迎新同学
scene: 班级同学为刚转来的新同学举办欢迎活动。

lines.en: Class, we have a new student today. His name is Oliver.
lines.zh: 同学们，今天有一位新同学。他叫Oliver。

lines.en: Hi everyone. I am happy to meet you all.
lines.zh: 大家好。很高兴见到你们。

lines.en: I am from Beijing. I just moved to this city.
lines.zh: 我从北京来。我刚搬来这个城市。

lines.en: Let us all welcome Oliver! He likes playing soccer.
lines.zh: 我们一起欢迎Oliver！他喜欢踢足球。

lines.en: Yes! Do we have a soccer team here?
We do! I am sure you will enjoy it here.
lines.zh: 有的！我相信你会喜欢这里的。

lines.en: Thank you, Teacher. Everyone seems very nice.
lines.zh: 谢谢老师。大家看起来都很友好。

lines.en: Lily, can you show Oliver around the school?
lines.zh: Lily，你能带Oliver参观一下学校吗？

lines.en: Thank you! I hope we can be good friends.
lines.zh: 谢谢！希望我们能成为好朋友。
